text.title: Browser Automation Overview Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the workload need JS rendering AND is the tool not already chosen?

conclusion.verdict: go to the matching sibling methodology

branch.when: language == python OR dotnet OR java

conclusion.verdict: Playwright preferred for auto-wait; Puppeteer if minimal deps required

text.example: Project needs Python + WebKit + auto-wait → Playwright (Python) → load playwright-automation.
